title: vicia ohwiana
intro: Vicia ohwiana, also known as the Ohwia vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its antidiarrheal and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Vicia ohwiana can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
